name: choose-next-task
description: Select the next runnable task slice with dependencies and traceability context.

arguments.name: phase
arguments.description: Optional phase or task group preference.

instructions: Do not select a task whose dependencies are incomplete or lack evidence.

If the task touches durable docs, stale-doc risk, or imported sources, report advisory canonical-context diagnostics and include canonical-context.md or an import-plan gap only when concrete authority risk affects the selected task.
Return the selected task with requirement, design, verification, durable target, and open-decision context.
If no task is runnable, return concrete blockers.
client_support_recovery: If MCP tools are unavailable, use spec_runtime.py next-task and read traceability.md directly; do not call a traceability_lookup.py script.
